_comment: Writing assets for the simplified Rival Hearts ruleset.

mood: Mood: The Beloved wants a {tone} letter.
rival: Rival: the Rival is watching the {route}.

recipient.name: The Beloved
recipient.bio: They read every letter as if the court may read it next.

routes.fast: Shortest path, easiest to rush, hardest to read.
routes.safe: Public path, steady pace, often the obvious choice.
routes.secret: Hidden path, tempting when the court is watching.

tones.honest: Plain truth, no ornament, no hiding.

hearts.text: The first letter arrives. The recipient smiles, alone, in a corner of the court.
A ribbon is returned with no message. It is the answer.
At the masquerade, the recipient leaves the dance to find them. The court understands. The court approves.

rumours.text: A fan opens. A name is mouthed behind it.
Two letters arrive at the wrong addresses. Both are read aloud.
By morning, the affair is in three languages and none of them is true.

endings.won: The recipient meets them at the lower gate. No letter is opened. No letter needs to be.
endings.lost: The Rival walks out of the ballroom holding a hand the Suitor never reached.

tutorialPrompts.title: You are not playing alone.
tutorialPrompts.body: Two roles take turns each round: the Suitor chooses the letter, and the Confidant sees the hidden truth but cannot speak.

tutorialPrompts.title: You see three hidden facts.
tutorialPrompts.body: You know the mood, danger route, and Rival route. Turn that truth into exactly two signals.

tutorialPrompts.title: Choose one action.
tutorialPrompts.body: Clear Danger protects the danger route. Delay Rival protects the Rival route. Strengthen Letter makes any tone fit.

tutorialPrompts.title: Read the two signals.
tutorialPrompts.body: Choose one route and one tone. The signals guide you, but they never resolve the round by themselves.

tutorialPrompts.title: One token resolves the round.
tutorialPrompts.body: A safe interpretation earns a Heart. A dangerous or Rival-caught mistake earns a Rumour. Three Hearts win. Three Rumours lose.

phaseLabels.suitor: The Suitor chooses route and tone
